---
title: "Bivariate Descriptive Statistics after preprocessing - Flight Prices"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    theme: cosmo
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)

Sys.setlocale("LC_TIME", "C")

list.of.packages <- c(
  "ggplot2", "dplyr", "visdat", "naniar", "DataExplorer",
  "VIM", "tidyr", "knitr", "here", "gridExtra"
)

new.packages <- list.of.packages[!(list.of.packages %in% installed.packages()[, "Package"])]

if (length(new.packages) > 0) {
  install.packages(new.packages, repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org")
}

invisible(lapply(list.of.packages, require, character.only = TRUE))
```

```{r load-cleaning}
input_path <- here::here("data", "interim", "flightprices_preprocessed.rds")
dd <- readRDS(input_path)
```

## General Statistical Overview

```{r general-summary}
inventario <- data.frame(
  Variable = names(dd),
  Type     = sapply(dd, function(x) paste(class(x), collapse = "/")),
  NAs      = sapply(dd, function(x) sum(is.na(x)))
)

knitr::kable(inventario, caption = "**Information of all variables**")
```

## Bivariate Analysis

```{r bivariate-analysis, results='asis', fig.width=10, fig.height=4}


unidades <- list(
  taxAmount       = "USD",
  totalPrice      = "USD",
  travelDistance  = "miles",
  segmentDistance = "miles"
)

analisis <- function(X, Y, nom_x, nom_y) {
  
  cat("\n\n### Variables:", nom_x, "vs", nom_y, "\n\n")
  
  # --- PASO 1: Detectar si son fechas antes de convertir ---
  es_fecha_x <- inherits(X, "Date") || inherits(X, "POSIXct")
  es_fecha_y <- inherits(Y, "Date") || inherits(Y, "POSIXct")
  
  # Convertimos a numérico para que ggplot y cor() funcionen
  if (es_fecha_x) X <- as.numeric(X)
  if (es_fecha_y) Y <- as.numeric(Y)
  
  unidad_x <- if (nom_x %in% names(unidades)) paste0(" (", unidades[[nom_x]], ")") else ""
  unidad_y <- if (nom_y %in% names(unidades)) paste0(" (", unidades[[nom_y]], ")") else ""
  
  # --- CASO 1: NUMERIC vs NUMERIC ---
  if (is.numeric(X) && is.numeric(Y)) {
    df <- data.frame(x = X, y = Y) %>% tidyr::drop_na()
    
    if (nrow(df) > 1) {
      corr <- cor(df$x, df$y, use = "complete.obs")
      cat("**Type:** Numeric vs Numeric  \n")
      cat("**Pearson correlation:**", round(corr, 4), "\n\n")
      
      # Para la tabla de resumen
      resumen <- data.frame(
        Statistic = c("N complete cases", "Mean X", "Mean Y", "SD X", "SD Y"),
        Value = c(
          as.character(nrow(df)),
          if(es_fecha_x) as.character(as.Date(mean(df$x), origin="1970-01-01")) else as.character(round(mean(df$x), 2)),
          if(es_fecha_y) as.character(as.Date(mean(df$y), origin="1970-01-01")) else as.character(round(mean(df$y), 2)),
          round(sd(df$x), 2),
          round(sd(df$y), 2)
        )
      )
      
      print(knitr::kable(resumen, caption = paste("Summary of", nom_x, "and", nom_y)))
      
      p1 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y)) +
        geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "steelblue") +
        geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "darkred") +
        labs(title = "Scatterplot", x = paste0(nom_x, unidad_x), y = paste0(nom_y, unidad_y)) +
        theme_minimal()
      
      # Si es fecha, forzamos al eje a entenderlo como tal para el gráfico
      if(es_fecha_x) p1 <- p1 + scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) as.Date(x, origin="1970-01-01"))
      if(es_fecha_y) p1 <- p1 + scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) as.Date(y, origin="1970-01-01"))
      
      p2 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y)) + geom_bin2d() +
        labs(title = "Density", x = paste0(nom_x, unidad_x), y = paste0(nom_y, unidad_y)) +
        theme_minimal()
      
      if(es_fecha_x) p2 <- p2 + scale_x_continuous(labels = function(x) as.Date(x, origin="1970-01-01"))
      if(es_fecha_y) p2 <- p2 + scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) as.Date(y, origin="1970-01-01"))
      
      gridExtra::grid.arrange(p1, p2, ncol = 2)
    }
    
  # --- CASO 2: CATEGORICAL (X) vs NUMERIC (Y) ---
  } else if ((is.factor(X) || is.character(X) || is.logical(X)) && is.numeric(Y)) {
    if (is.logical(X)) X <- as.factor(X)
    df <- data.frame(x = as.factor(X), y = Y) %>% tidyr::drop_na()
    
    if (nrow(df) > 0) {
      cat("**Type:** Categorical vs Numeric  \n\n")
      resumen_cat <- df %>% group_by(x) %>%
        summarise(n = n(), Mean_val = mean(y), Median_val = median(y), SD = sd(y), .groups = "drop")
      
      # Formatear fechas en la tabla si corresponde
      if (es_fecha_y) {
        resumen_cat <- resumen_cat %>% mutate(
          Mean = as.character(as.Date(Mean_val, origin="1970-01-01")),
          Median = as.character(as.Date(Median_val, origin="1970-01-01"))
        ) %>% select(x, n, Mean, Median, SD)
      } else {
        resumen_cat <- resumen_cat %>% mutate(Mean = round(Mean_val, 2), Median = round(Median_val, 2)) %>%
          select(x, n, Mean, Median, SD)
      }
      
      print(knitr::kable(resumen_cat, caption = paste("Summary of", nom_y, "by", nom_x)))
      
      p1 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = x, y = y, fill = x)) + geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
        labs(title = "Boxplot", x = nom_x, y = paste0(nom_y, unidad_y)) +
        theme_minimal() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + guides(fill = "none")
      
      if(es_fecha_y) p1 <- p1 + scale_y_continuous(labels = function(y) as.Date(y, origin="1970-01-01"))
      
      print(p1)
    }
    
  # --- CASO 3: NUMERIC (X) vs CATEGORICAL (Y) ---
  } else if (is.numeric(X) && (is.factor(Y) || is.character(Y) || is.logical(Y))) {
    if (is.logical(Y)) Y <- as.factor(Y)
    df <- data.frame(x = X, y = as.factor(Y)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()
    
    if (nrow(df) > 0) {
      cat("**Type:** Numeric vs Categorical  \n\n")
      resumen_cat <- df %>% group_by(y) %>%
        summarise(n = n(), Mean_val = mean(x), Median_val = median(x), SD = sd(x), .groups = "drop")
      
      if (es_fecha_x) {
        resumen_cat <- resumen_cat %>% mutate(
          Mean = as.character(as.Date(Mean_val, origin="1970-01-01")),
          Median = as.character(as.Date(Median_val, origin="1970-01-01"))
        ) %>% select(y, n, Mean, Median, SD)
      } else {
        resumen_cat <- resumen_cat %>% mutate(Mean = round(Mean_val, 2), Median = round(Median_val, 2)) %>%
          select(y, n, Mean, Median, SD)
      }
      
      print(knitr::kable(resumen_cat, caption = paste("Summary of", nom_x, "by", nom_y)))
      
      p1 <- ggplot(df, aes(x = y, y = x, fill = y)) + geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.7) +
        labs(title = "Boxplot", x = nom_y, y = paste0(nom_x, unidad_x)) +
        theme_minimal() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) + guides(fill = "none")
      
      if(es_fecha_x) p1 <- p1 + scale_y_continuous(labels = function(x) as.Date(x, origin="1970-01-01"))
      
      print(p1)
    }
    
  # --- CASO 4: CATEGORICAL vs CATEGORICAL ---
  } else if ((is.factor(X) || is.character(X) || is.logical(X)) &&
             (is.factor(Y) || is.character(Y) || is.logical(Y))) {
    if (is.logical(X)) X <- as.factor(X)
    if (is.logical(Y)) Y <- as.factor(Y)
    df <- data.frame(x = as.factor(X), y = as.factor(Y)) %>% tidyr::drop_na()
    
    if (nrow(df) > 0) {
      cat("**Type:** Categorical vs Categorical  \n\n")
      tabla <- table(df$x, df$y)
      print(knitr::kable(as.data.frame.matrix(tabla), caption = paste("Contingency table:", nom_x, "vs", nom_y)))
      
      df_tab <- as.data.frame(tabla)
      colnames(df_tab) <- c("X", "Y", "Freq")
      p1 <- ggplot(df_tab, aes(x = X, y = Y, fill = Freq)) + geom_tile() +
        geom_text(aes(label = Freq), size = 3) +
        labs(title = "Heatmap", x = nom_x, y = nom_y) +
        theme_minimal() + theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
      print(p1)
    }
  }
  
  
}

vars <- names(dd)

for (i in 1:(length(vars) - 1)) {
  for (j in (i + 1):length(vars)) {
    analisis(dd[[vars[i]]], dd[[vars[j]]], vars[i], vars[j])
  }
}
```

## Correlation Matrix of Numeric Variables

```{r correlations, fig.width=9, fig.height=7}
vars_num <- names(dd)[sapply(dd, is.numeric)]

if (length(vars_num) > 1) {
  cor_mat <- cor(dd[, vars_num], use = "pairwise.complete.obs")
  
  corr_df <- as.data.frame(as.table(cor_mat))
  colnames(corr_df) <- c("Var1", "Var2", "Correlation")
  
  ggplot(corr_df, aes(x = Var1, y = Var2, fill = Correlation)) +
    geom_tile() +
    geom_text(aes(label = round(Correlation, 2)), size = 3) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0) +
    labs(title = "Correlation Matrix") +
    theme_minimal() +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
}
```
